 doing whale, how are you lyrics

trapped in a cycle
addiction to diction
[hoping](hoping) the mic'll make admissions emissions
i'm liable to libel the mission before i pull the trigger
buy a bible because i had a vision this isn't viable
listen i'm listing not just putting things down
taken more in than i can fit in my mouth
spitting a verse won't bail me out
if y'all won't hear me out
so i learned to swim like a whale dared to share how
surface to breathe air then take the stairs  down
it's all music to me, ya just there for the exhale
the low, the breach, and the flair of my tail
plus the spray that i make flushin my
well, ok this isn't coming out well
no wait, let me try it again
i got ate by a leviathan
couldn't escape so i'm stagin a sit in
burning what i won't miss yet hopin the smoke provokes it
to blow a hole that i can fit in
long enough to get out cuz i got a whole ocean to swim in
find a flow to float
get to know my neighbors
grateful for the graces
playful with the portions
we know saving won't save us
so people's platefuls don't plague us
sure i make a fool of myself more when i'm full of y'all too
we all do
but i trust that more than the trail i blazed to crawl through the maze
we all do something we saw to
in awe and amazed
surrounded by sawtooths
afraid, ashamed, ablaze at who saw you
what they could say if they want to
especially the ones quick to cut in i warned you
that's something i won't do
see you down and get on you
saddle and sit on you
watch you drown and spit on you
cuz i'm too miserable to imagine ya battles didn't fit in my little view
that there's ground being fought over outside my living room
and you sitting here battered is living proof
i get it boo
